item.title: And what a journey is has been since the moment I said, ‚ÄúI‚Äôl...
item.description:
View on Instagram


And what a journey is has been since the moment I said, ‚ÄúI‚Äôll have to do it myself!‚ÄĚ ūü§ĮI honestly have to keep pinching myself and even then I‚Äôm still having trouble fathoming the sheer size of the project I achieved. ūüŹÜI know this is only the beginning and there‚Äôs a long way to go but the amount of skills and knowledge I picked in just 8 weeks of completing my house foundations has opened up a whole new door for me ūüö™And I‚Äôm so excited to continue opening doors as this journey unfolds and watch the evolution over time, this is the beginning of something magical I can feel it ‚ú®ūüĆĽ#housefootings #foundations #ownerbuilder #howhardcanitbe #illdoitmyself #containerhouse

item.title: ūüõ†ÔłŹūüŹ†How I started my container home build journey ūüŹ†ūüõ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


ūüõ†ÔłŹūüŹ†How I started my container home build journey ūüŹ†ūüõ†ÔłŹThe vision wasn‚Äôt always clear, but my dream evolved with the changing circumstances and not once have I ever doubted my ability to get it done.ūüí™Life is full of challenges and obstacles, if you have the tools to get through them, those former challenges transform into our wins and successes, the building blocks that make up who we are. ūüßćI believe one of the main factors of how we live our life is perception, we don‚Äôt see reality as it is, we see it as we are ūüĎÄThis is your life, your reality and the key word here is ‚Äėyou‚Äô! It all comes down to you, how do you want to perceive your reality? ‚ú®ūüę∂#mystory #containerhome #buildjourney #ownerbuilder #shippingcontainer #shippingcontainerhome #buildingadream

item.title: It‚Äôs been 6 weeks now since‚Ä¶I decided to do my own house fou...
item.description:
View on Instagram


It‚Äôs been 6 weeks now since‚Ä¶I decided to do my own house foundations ūüŹ†As an owner builder the only jobs I am not allowed to do are the plumbing and electrical, however the foundations for my house is a job I had originally wanted to contract out due to its importance. ‚öíÔłŹHowever with my budget only being 100k for my entire house build and getting quotes back all around the 60k mark for the house foundations alone there was just no other way than to do it myself. ūü§∑‚Äć‚ôÄÔłŹBut wow it‚Äôs been a massive surprise to me how much is involved in the process, in my mind digging holes would be one of the simplest parts of the whole job however it has turned out to be the hardest and most time consuming ‚ĆõÔłŹThis is because my soil type is rock hard clay so even a digger struggled with the job, it wasn‚Äôt until I found a cheap jack hammer on marketplace that the game changed and digging the holes became more ‚Äėdo-able‚Äô ūüöúThe majority of the six weeks that I‚Äôve been working on the foundations has been dedicated to digging and that leads into my question. ūüôč What‚Äôs your opinion? ‚¨áÔłŹDo you think it‚Äôs worth saving 9/10 of the quoted cost to complete my foundations, even though it‚Äôs taking 2-3x the amount of time? ūü§∑‚Äć‚ôÄÔłŹ#homebuildbudget #ownerbuilder #containerhome #housefoundations #solobuild #diy

item.title: I finished installing all my barge capping! ūüėĚAnd it‚Äôs trans...
item.description:
View on Instagram


I finished installing all my barge capping! ūüėĚAnd it‚Äôs transformed my roof, this is my first final touch of the house everything else I‚Äôve built still needs the pretty final touches but now my roof only needs gutters and timber installed on the under side! ūüėćI‚Äôm installing gutters now but the final timber on the roof installation will get done later in the build when there‚Äôs no welding or grinding left that would damage it ‚ėļÔłŹ

item.title: Even after all the challenges I‚Äôve faced on this build I still...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Even after all the challenges I‚Äôve faced on this build I still head into the build every day with a ‚Äúhow hard could it be attitude‚ÄĚ ūüėāSome days I‚Äôm spot on the money and others it‚Äôs 10x harder than I could have ever imagined but without fail after the end of every back breaking day the next morning I wake up and I‚Äôve somehow reset back to my same ‚Äėhow hard can it be‚Äô outlook.I‚Äôm not sure what type of wizardry this is, I‚Äôm just grateful ūüėĚ‚ú®

item.title: Final roof elements are getting completed now! ‚ŹįWith the facia...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Final roof elements are getting completed now! ‚ŹįWith the facias installed the only two things I have left are gutters and trim and with them being so light how hard can it be right ūüėĚ

item.title: Just over a year ago I had never welded a day in my life and now...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Just over a year ago I had never welded a day in my life and now there‚Äôs rarely a day when I‚Äôm not welding something ūüĎ©‚ÄćūüŹ≠Did I pick up the skill straight away? No. Was I a natural? No Did I work my ass off at it and weld for hours a day until I was pretty dam good, F*** YES I did! We aren‚Äôt disappointed when a child doesn‚Äôt come out of the womb running and we don‚Äôt judge how smart a fish is on its ability to climb a tree.Let‚Äôs give ourselves the same courtesy and not let the fear of not being able to do something keep us from doing anything at all ūüćÉ

item.title: Now that the last roof sheet is up I can start to move onto the ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Now that the last roof sheet is up I can start to move onto the final important components of the roof like fascia‚Äôs, gutters and trim! ūüėĚI‚Äôll be installing a lot of timber on the underneath of the roof for the final touch but that will be done towards the end of the build ūüŹ†

item.title: Hands up if you‚Äôve been waiting for this one for a while ūüôč‚...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Hands up if you‚Äôve been waiting for this one for a while ūüôč‚Äć‚ôÄÔłŹI know I have! ūüėĚI got my last roof sheet a couple months ago (and two spare because I‚Äôve learnt from my past mistakes ūüėā) but I had no way of actually getting off the roof when I had the last roof sheet installed.But I finally bought scaffolding which meant a safe passage to the ground! ‚ėĀÔłŹ
